mapper.select:
SELECT table_name, table_comment, create_time FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = ( SELECT DATABASE ())
and table_name like concat('%', #{data.tableName}, '%')
and table_comment like concat('%', #{data.tableComment}, '%')
order by create_time desc

SELECT a.column_name, a.is_nullable, a.data_type, a.column_comment, a.column_key, a.extra, c.table_comment FROM information_schema.COLUMNS a, ( SELECT table_comment FROM information_schema.TABLES b WHERE table_schema = ( SELECT DATABASE ()) AND b.table_name = #{tableName} ) c WHERE table_schema = (SELECT DATABASE()) AND a.table_name = #{tableName} and a.column_name not in ('create_user_id', 'create_time', 'update_user_id', 'update_time', 'del_flag', 'tenant_id') order by ordinal_position
